title: Elytra Contrails Spigot
description: Adds server-side support for Elytra Contrails Mod for Spigot-based servers
body:
NOTE: THE MOD IS STILL REQUIRED CLIENT-SIDE FOR TRAILS TO SHOW ON THE CLIENT.

This plugin lets fabric clients with the Elytra Contrails mod see eachother's custom trail settings, as well as allowing them to see eachother twirling!


Note: only works with version 1.3.0+ of Elytra Contrails Mod
